channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.mmorpg.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.mmorpg.com

item.title: Throne and Liberty Team Shares Progress Updates on Battlegrounds Change and What's Next
item.content:encoded:
There’s a new development update for Throne and Liberty, focused on Battlegrounds changes and balance. 

The latest comes in the form of a “Resistance Report”  devblog updating on their progress. As for Battlegrounds, balance is, unsurprisingly, something that needs active evaluation and tweaks. 

While there’s not much being revealed in this blog, they do mention one change that they recently made in reverting a debuff that they had originally applied to healing within battlegrounds. These came in the April 8th update that originally added the brand new Floating Elf Garden map. Depending on the role type you were playing,  debuffs to healing, healing over time, and even shield health created stark drops of -95% healing and healing over time for tanks and DPS, with an additional -95% debuff to shield health for DPS classes.

Instead of continuing to test it and maybe brainstorm how to work around it, they have decided to roll it back in the name of combat balance. The team thanks the community for their feedback, and say they are monitoring Battlegrounds data, especially following the release of the new map recently and are looking at where they can make improvements.

There’s also a (sort of) hint at what’s coming over the next two months, with  “a substantial amount of new content” coming, But they are not ready to share the details yet, but do sound enthusiastic about it so we'll have to see what they're cooking.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/throne-and-liberty-team-shares-progress-updates-on-battlegrounds-change-and-whats-next-2000137882
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Golden Pursuits, 'Prepare for the Night Market' is Coming to The Elder Scrolls Online Next Week
item.content:encoded:
There hasn’t been a new Golden Pursuits campaign in The Elder Scrolls Online this month, but that’s changing next week to coincide with the arrival of the Night Market event zone.

Golden Pursuits “Prepare for the Night Market” and the Market itself both open on April 29th. The Night Market itself is brand new and full of mystery and discoveries to make. Here, there are also rewards to earn and activities to go along with the event zone in this new campaign.

There are 20 activities available to choose to complete to earn some new stuff. You’ll be able to see the complete list in the Activity Finder, but In the announcement we get a few ideas of what awaits us and those include defeating world bosses, looting treasure chests, and completing Undaunted Pledges.

You can get new face and body markings, Seals,  a new emote, and even a new pet. The Golden Riften Rogue Face Markings And be yours for completing just two activities. complete four activities and get the Golden Riften Rogue Body Markings. For eight activities, 500 Seals will be yours. Complete 12 and get the “Not My Coins!” emote. Finally, complete 16 activities to get the Whale Shark Pangrit Nymphling pet. 

There's more to prepare with in the Golden Pursuits announcement post.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/golden-pursuits-prepare-for-the-night-market-is-coming-to-the-elder-scrolls-online-next-week-2000137881
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
